creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for putting "Team", and can we get that "Nobody" suffix removed? I don't think it actually encourages anything.

Note we also have names like " FreeBSD Rust Team":

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi?email1=rust%40FreeBSD.org&emailassigned_to1=1&emailtype1=substring&list_id=409772&query_format=advanced
